trump_iran_deal.content: Dear Iran, please give us 48 hrs ceasefire. [引用7h前: 'Went from liberating to bomb back to Stone Age in 3 weeks']
America lies too much. They will still bomb Iran during ceasefire. Who's going to believe you.

BREAKING: Iran flatly rejects US demand for 48-hour ceasefire. Tehran responded with heavy attacks citing strikes on US troops in Kuwait. WSJ: stalled truce talks, Iran calls American conditions unacceptable.
Trump and Netanyahu should be judged for this war. USA and Israel are cruelest sides but Iran should not apply oppression.
France made a deal with Iranian murderers, their ship passed through straits without being attacked. Big mistake.
Trump hoping to manipulate market by claiming Iran negotiating deal again but Iran ain't playin that game.
Iran never attacked anyone. Israel now targeting Turkey as next. Is Trump going to war with Turkey (NATO member) too?
Trump had a better deal on the table and turned it down bc Israel forced his hand.
US had nuclear deal with Iran. Trump shredded it, killed their military leader. Crashed US economy FOR A SECOND TIME.
This War will be Over FAST now that they said No Deal. TRUMP gave them every CHANCE to SAVE IRAN BUT they WANT TO DIE.
We had JCPOA. Trump screwed up the deal. The IAEA confirmed Iran was following it to the letter.

iran_ceasefire.content: The US demands a ceasefire, and Iran replies with a more intense attack.
Iran's response to US 48-hour ceasefire request: Launching missiles into Israel.
Iran not guessing - defend and attack enemy targets. No ceasefire which USA begged for. Iran fully in the war, Russia and China supporting.
Trump claimed on April 1 that Iran's president sought a ceasefire (Iran denied as false). Iran rejected US 15-point proposal.
Iran increasingly insists all doors closed. No ceasefire, no negotiations, no meetings. WSJ: Iran rejects all US demands, refuses to meet in Pakistan.

iran_war.content: Trump said Iran cant shoot down US jets, yet today Iran shot down F-15E! Trump is pathological liar.
Etihad reached 70% of pre-Iran War flight activity - 86 passenger flights from Abu Dhabi on April 4, 2026.
They bombed Iran, killed the Ayatollah, Maga celebrated. Iran has a million-man army and there is no exit plan.

posts.content: PRESIDENT TRUMP ON IRAN: 'Keep the oil, anyone?'
CDS trading volume Q1 2026 surges +69% to record $4.5 trillion - highest on record. Exceeds previous record set in Q2 2025 during tariff turmoil.
Total oil product exports from Middle East plunged -63% in March, -4.8 million b/d, to ~2.8 million b/d. Biggest global energy crisis in history.
President Trump to unveil $1.5 trillion defense budget - largest yearly US military spending increase since World War II.
$12 trillion Charles Schwab to launch Bitcoin and Ethereum trading for users 'soon.'
Michael Saylor: It's a Good Friday to buy Bitcoin.
DOJ is done releasing Epstein files.
Europe markets sell-off: 'Sell Everything Europe': 3rd biggest dump in a decade as flows go full capitulation.

key_developments.headline: US F-15E Strike Eagle shot down over Iran
key_developments.detail: First manned US aircraft shot down by enemy fire in Operation Epic Fury. One crew rescued, search ongoing for second. Iran offering bounties for crew capture. 13 US service members killed, 348 wounded.

key_developments.headline: Iran flatly rejects 48-hour ceasefire demand
key_developments.detail: Iran rejected US 48-hour ceasefire demand in writing. Instead responded with heavy attacks citing strikes on US troops in Kuwait. WSJ reports fully stalled truce talks. Iran calls US conditions (nuclear curbs, missile limits) unacceptable.

key_developments.headline: CDS volume +69% to record $4.5 trillion in Q1 2026
key_developments.detail: Record corporate default hedging - exceeds Q2 2025 tariff turmoil peak. Market fear at all-time high.
